## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] My prompt generates an **original, fictional** design
- [ ] No copyrighted material, trademarked brands, or proprietary assets are used
- [ ] All brand names in the prompt are **entirely fictional**
- [ ] I have tested this prompt with at least one AI tool
- [ ] The generated design is visually impressive and production-ready
